Weapon Preference: Missiles
Research Preference: Energy

The Paratis are a human-sized insectoid aquatic species.

The Paratis are very passive in nature. Even amongst themselves, they live mostly in isolation, coming together begrudgingly to cooperate to achieve similar goals.

Still, Paratis are not trustworthy despite their seemingly placid nature, they spend large amounts of time plotting their own advancement at the expense of others.

The Paratis deep knowledge of missile weaponry has culminated in the development of the Paratis Hammerhead, a missile system that is remarkably quick yet yields a surprisingly large payload.  Range of this weapon system is limited, however, but the raw firepower makes up for this.

Unique to the Paratis is The Game, an elaborate sport that acts out wars in elaborate social displays of debate, intrigue and political maneuvering. This game is a combination of competitive, social and training that draw Paratis together more than any other possible reason for interaction. This game can vary in level of brutality depending on the stakes but is also a form of entertainment transmitted for leisure. Their greatest heroes are often the best at the sport.
